description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa upholstered in a vibrant pink fabric, featuring a gently curved backrest and armrests that seamlessly flow into each other. The seat and backrest are adorned with subtle button tufting, adding a touch of visual interest and texture. The sofa sits on four slender, outward-angled legs, likely made of metal, which elevate the piece and give it a light, airy appearance. The armrests are integrated into the overall form, rising to the same height as the backrest and curving inward for a cozy, enveloping feel. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible seams or patterns aside from the tufting. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A compact, modern pink sofa with curved armrests and backrest, button tufting, and slender metal legs. The upholstery is smooth and uniform, giving it a sleek, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sofa's curved backrest, integrated armrests, button-tufted seat and back, and all four slender legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's depth, the continuous curve of the armrest and backrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unadorned backrest curve and the two rear legs, emphasizing the sofa's enveloping shape.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view reveals the sofa's overall curvature, the transition between armrest and backrest, and the leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, attached seat and back cushions with uniform button tufting; cushions are integrated and not loose.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, integrated armrests at the same height as the backrest, smoothly transitioning from the sides with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, outward-angled legs positioned at the corners, likely metal with a dark finish, fully exposed and slightly tapered.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous curved backrest with attached cushion and subtle button tufting, forming a seamless line with the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pink fabric with smooth texture and subtle button tufting on the seat and backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
